requirement_topic.en: Market Access — O'zStandart Mandatory Certification / Declaration of Conformity
requirement_topic.zh: 市场准入——O'zStandart强制认证/合格声明
requirement_topic.zht: 市場准入——O'zStandart強制認證/合格聲明

summary.en: Household refrigerating appliances imported into Uzbekistan must hold a valid conformity document issued under the national (non-EAEU) regulatory regime administered by O'zStandart (the Uzbek Agency for Technical Regulation). Depending on the product category and the applicable technical regulation, this is either a certificate of conformity (for products subject to mandatory certification) or a declaration of conformity, established through O'zStandart or an accredited Uzbek conformity-assessment body and referencing the applicable O'zDSt / adopted IEC (and legacy GOST) standards for safety and EMC. The conformity document is generally required for customs clearance and lawful sale, must reference the model(s) covered and the standards applied, and is supported by test reports. Uzbekistan is NOT an EAEU member, so an EAEU EAC certificate or declaration does not by itself satisfy Uzbek requirements (and vice versa); the national O'zStandart route applies.
summary.zh: 进口至乌兹别克斯坦的家用制冷器具须持有在由O'zStandart（乌兹别克技术法规局）管理的国家（非欧亚经济联盟）监管制度下签发的有效合格文件。视产品类别及适用技术法规而定，该文件为合格证书（适用于须强制认证的产品）或合格声明，通过O'zStandart或乌方认可的合格评定机构建立，并引用适用于安全和电磁兼容的O'zDSt/采用的IEC（及沿用的GOST）标准。合格文件通常为清关及合法销售所必需，须注明所涵盖的型号及所采用的标准，并以检测报告为支撑。乌兹别克斯坦非欧亚经济联盟成员，故欧亚经济联盟EAC证书或声明本身不能满足乌方要求（反之亦然）；适用国家O'zStandart路径。
summary.zht: 進口至烏茲別克的家用製冷器具須持有在由O'zStandart（烏茲別克技術法規局）管理的國家（非歐亞經濟聯盟）監管制度下簽發的有效合格文件。視產品類別及適用技術法規而定，該文件為合格證書（適用於須強制認證的產品）或合格聲明，通過O'zStandart或烏方認可的合格評定機構建立，並引用適用於安全和電磁相容的O'zDSt/採用的IEC（及沿用的GOST）標準。合格文件通常為清關及合法銷售所必需，須注明所涵蓋的型號及所採用的標準，並以檢測報告為支撐。烏茲別克非歐亞經濟聯盟成員，故歐亞經濟聯盟EAC證書或聲明本身不能滿足烏方要求（反之亦然）；適用國家O'zStandart路徑。

standards_or_laws: Uzbekistan Law on Technical Regulation / Law on Certification of Products and Services — national conformity-assessment framework administered by O'zStandart
O'zStandart certification / declaration-of-conformity procedures — referencing applicable O'zDSt / adopted IEC (and legacy GOST) safety and EMC standards
Uzbekistan customs requirements — conformity document generally required for clearance and lawful sale of regulated appliances

summary.en: In China, household refrigerating appliances require China Compulsory Certification (CCC) covering safety (GB 4706.13) and EMC (GB 4343.1) before sale. CCC is a mandatory third-party certification administered by CNCA-designated certification bodies (CABs) and enforced by SAMR; the certificate identifies the certified models and the GB standards applied. Energy labelling (China Energy Label, based on GB 12021.2) is a separate mandatory requirement administered by NDRC/SAMR. The CCC certificate is a domestic-market document referencing GB standards and the Chinese certification regime; it is not itself a recognised Uzbek conformity document.
summary.zh: 在中国，家用制冷器具在销售前须取得中国强制认证（CCC），涵盖安全（GB 4706.13）和电磁兼容（GB 4343.1）。CCC为强制性第三方认证，由CNCA指定认证机构（CAB）审核并由市场监管总局（SAMR）执行；证书载明获证型号及所采用的GB标准。能效标识（基于GB 12021.2的中国能效标识）是由NDRC/SAMR管理的独立强制性要求。CCC证书为引用GB标准及中国认证制度的国内市场文件，本身并非乌方承认的合格文件。
summary.zht: 在中國，家用製冷器具在銷售前須取得中國強制認證（CCC），涵蓋安全（GB 4706.13）和電磁相容（GB 4343.1）。CCC為強制性第三方認證，由CNCA指定認證機構（CAB）審核並由市場監管總局（SAMR）執行；證書載明獲證型號及所採用的GB標準。能效標識（基於GB 12021.2的中國能效標識）是由NDRC/SAMR管理的獨立強制性要求。CCC證書為引用GB標準及中國認證制度的國內市場文件，本身並非烏方承認的合格文件。

standards_or_laws: CCC (China Compulsory Certification) — safety (GB 4706.13) + EMC (GB 4343.1); mandatory; administered by CNCA/SAMR
China Energy Label — Measures for the Administration of Energy Efficiency Labels (NDRC/SAMR); based on GB 12021.2-2015

gap.en: Chinese manufacturers must obtain an Uzbek conformity document under the O'zStandart regime — CCC does not substitute: (1) A certificate or declaration of conformity must be issued through O'zStandart or an accredited Uzbek conformity-assessment body, referencing the applicable O'zDSt / adopted IEC standards (IEC 60335-2-24 for safety, CISPR 14 for EMC). (2) Test-report re-use — because the Uzbek standards adopt IEC/CISPR, accredited IEC/CISPR (including IECEE CB Scheme) test data can often support the Uzbek conformity assessment, reducing or avoiding re-testing; confirm acceptance with the body. (3) EAEU note — an EAEU EAC certificate/declaration does not by itself satisfy the Uzbek national regime; the O'zStandart route must be followed. (4) Documentation — the conformity document, model list, markings, and product information must align with Uzbek requirements (including language). (5) The conformity document is generally a precondition for customs clearance of regulated appliances.
gap.zh: 中国制造商须在O'zStandart制度下取得乌方合格文件——CCC不能替代：（1）须通过O'zStandart或乌方认可的合格评定机构签发合格证书或声明，引用适用的O'zDSt/采用的IEC标准（安全用IEC 60335-2-24，电磁兼容用CISPR 14）。（2）检测报告复用——由于乌方标准采用IEC/CISPR，认可的IEC/CISPR（含IECEE CB体系）检测数据通常可支撑乌方合格评定，减少或免除重新检测；请向机构确认接受情况。（3）欧亚经济联盟说明——欧亚经济联盟EAC证书/声明本身不能满足乌方国家制度；须遵循O'zStandart路径。（4）文件——合格文件、型号清单、标识及产品信息须符合乌方要求（含语言）。（5）合格文件通常是受监管器具清关的前提条件。
gap.zht: 中國製造商須在O'zStandart制度下取得烏方合格文件——CCC不能替代：（1）須通過O'zStandart或烏方認可的合格評定機構簽發合格證書或聲明，引用適用的O'zDSt/採用的IEC標準（安全用IEC 60335-2-24，電磁相容用CISPR 14）。（2）檢測報告複用——由於烏方標準採用IEC/CISPR，認可的IEC/CISPR（含IECEE CB體系）檢測數據通常可支撐烏方合格評定，減少或免除重新檢測；請向機構確認接受情況。（3）歐亞經濟聯盟說明——歐亞經濟聯盟EAC證書/聲明本身不能滿足烏方國家制度；須遵循O'zStandart路徑。（4）文件——合格文件、型號清單、標識及產品資訊須符合烏方要求（含語言）。（5）合格文件通常是受監管器具清關的前提條件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — a valid O'zStandart certificate or declaration of conformity (referencing the applicable O'zDSt/adopted IEC standards) is required before customs clearance and lawful sale; the national regime applies (Uzbekistan is not an EAEU member)
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC certification (safety + EMC) + China Energy Label display required before sale in China

source.publisher: O'zStandart — Uzbek Agency for Technical Regulation

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Market access to Uzbekistan requires an O'zStandart certificate or declaration of conformity under the national (non-EAEU) regime, referencing the adopted IEC 60335-2-24 (safety) and CISPR 14 (EMC) standards. Chinese CCC does not substitute, and an EAEU EAC document does not by itself satisfy Uzbek requirements. Accredited IEC/CISPR (CB Scheme) test data can often support the assessment — confirm acceptance with the conformity-assessment body.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 进入乌兹别克斯坦市场须在国家（非欧亚经济联盟）制度下取得O'zStandart合格证书或声明，引用所采用的IEC 60335-2-24（安全）和CISPR 14（电磁兼容）标准。中国CCC不能替代，欧亚经济联盟EAC文件本身亦不能满足乌方要求。认可的IEC/CISPR（CB体系）检测数据通常可支撑评定——请向合格评定机构确认接受情况。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 進入烏茲別克市場須在國家（非歐亞經濟聯盟）制度下取得O'zStandart合格證書或聲明，引用所採用的IEC 60335-2-24（安全）和CISPR 14（電磁相容）標準。中國CCC不能替代，歐亞經濟聯盟EAC文件本身亦不能滿足烏方要求。認可的IEC/CISPR（CB體系）檢測數據通常可支撐評定——請向合格評定機構確認接受情況。

requirement_topic.en: Market Access — In-Country Importer / Representative & Landlocked Logistics
requirement_topic.zh: 市场准入——境内进口商/代表及内陆物流
requirement_topic.zht: 市場准入——境內進口商/代表及內陸物流

summary.en: Placing household refrigerators on the Uzbek market in practice requires an in-country importer or representative — a locally established legal entity that imports the goods, holds (or has access to) the O'zStandart certificate/declaration of conformity and supporting test reports, presents documentation to customs, and is the responsible party for the regulated product in Uzbekistan. Because Uzbekistan is doubly landlocked, goods arrive by rail or road (typically transiting neighbouring countries), so the importer also manages customs transit, import duties/VAT, and any required import documentation. Product information and markings must meet Uzbek market requirements, including the required language. The in-country importer/representative is the practical anchor for conformity-document retention and for cooperation with the national market-control and customs authorities.
summary.zh: 实务上，将家用电冰箱投放乌兹别克市场须有境内进口商或代表——一个在当地设立的法律实体，负责进口货物，持有（或可访问）O'zStandart合格证书/声明及支撑检测报告，向海关提交文件，并作为受监管产品在乌兹别克斯坦的责任方。由于乌兹别克斯坦为双重内陆国，货物经铁路或公路（通常过境邻国）抵达，故进口商还须管理海关过境、进口关税/增值税及任何所需进口文件。产品信息及标识须符合乌方市场要求，含所需语言。境内进口商/代表是合格文件保存及配合国家市场管控和海关机构的实际依托。
summary.zht: 實務上，將家用電冰箱投放烏茲別克市場須有境內進口商或代表——一個在當地設立的法律實體，負責進口貨物，持有（或可訪問）O'zStandart合格證書/聲明及支撐檢測報告，向海關提交文件，並作為受監管產品在烏茲別克的責任方。由於烏茲別克為雙重內陸國，貨物經鐵路或公路（通常過境鄰國）抵達，故進口商還須管理海關過境、進口關稅/增值稅及任何所需進口文件。產品資訊及標識須符合烏方市場要求，含所需語言。境內進口商/代表是合格文件保存及配合國家市場管控和海關機構的實際依託。

standards_or_laws: Uzbekistan customs and import regulations — importer of record, import duties/VAT, and transit documentation for landlocked rail/road delivery
O'zStandart conformity-assessment framework — certificate/declaration typically held by the in-country importer/representative
Uzbek market language and marking requirements — product information and markings in the required language

summary.en: China has no direct regulatory equivalent requiring an export manufacturer to appoint a foreign in-country responsible representative for product compliance abroad. Under the domestic CCC regime, the certificate holder is the responsible party for compliance within China; export manufacturers typically engage overseas distributors or importers on a commercial basis. The Chinese CCC holder role does not extend to, or satisfy, the Uzbek requirement for an in-country importer/representative who holds the O'zStandart conformity document and cooperates with Uzbek customs and market authorities.
summary.zh: 中国没有直接的监管等同规定，要求出口制造商在境外指定负责产品合规的境内责任代表。在国内CCC制度下，证书持有人为中国境内合规的责任方；出口制造商通常以商业形式委任海外经销商或进口商。中国CCC持有人角色不延伸至、亦不能满足乌方对持有O'zStandart合格文件并配合乌方海关及市场机构的境内进口商/代表的要求。
summary.zht: 中國沒有直接的監管等同規定，要求出口製造商在境外指定負責產品合規的境內責任代表。在國內CCC制度下，證書持有人為中國境內合規的責任方；出口製造商通常以商業形式委任海外經銷商或進口商。中國CCC持有人角色不延伸至、亦不能滿足烏方對持有O'zStandart合格文件並配合烏方海關及市場機構的境內進口商/代表的要求。

standards_or_laws: N/A — no direct Chinese regulatory equivalent for the Uzbek in-country importer/representative obligation

gap.en: This is a structural gap with no Chinese regulatory analogue: (1) Chinese manufacturers must work through an in-country Uzbek importer/representative who acts as importer of record, holds the O'zStandart certificate/declaration and test reports, and is the responsible party for the regulated appliance in Uzbekistan. (2) Logistics — because Uzbekistan is landlocked, delivery is by rail or road with transit through neighbouring countries; the importer manages customs transit, duties/VAT, and import documentation, which affects lead time and landed cost relative to seaborne markets. (3) Documentation/language — product information and markings must meet Uzbek requirements (including the required language), and the importer is the practical channel for ensuring the conformity document and labelling are in order at the border. (4) Without an in-country importer/representative holding valid conformity documentation, regulated appliances cannot in practice clear customs or be lawfully sold. [NOTE: Specific importer-of-record, duty/VAT, and language/marking requirements should be confirmed against Uzbek customs and O'zStandart sources before shipment.]
gap.zh: 这是一个在中国监管体系中没有类似规定的结构性差距：（1）中国制造商须通过境内乌方进口商/代表运作，由其担任进口记录人，持有O'zStandart证书/声明及检测报告，并作为受监管器具在乌兹别克斯坦的责任方。（2）物流——由于乌兹别克斯坦为内陆国，须经铁路或公路并过境邻国交付；进口商管理海关过境、关税/增值税及进口文件，相较海运市场会影响交期和到岸成本。（3）文件/语言——产品信息及标识须符合乌方要求（含所需语言），进口商是确保合格文件及标识在口岸齐备的实际渠道。（4）若无持有有效合格文件的境内进口商/代表，受监管器具实务上无法清关或合法销售。【注：具体的进口记录人、关税/增值税及语言/标识要求，应在发货前对照乌方海关及O'zStandart来源确认。】
gap.zht: 這是一個在中國監管體系中沒有類似規定的結構性差距：（1）中國製造商須通過境內烏方進口商/代表運作，由其擔任進口記錄人，持有O'zStandart證書/聲明及檢測報告，並作為受監管器具在烏茲別克的責任方。（2）物流——由於烏茲別克為內陸國，須經鐵路或公路並過境鄰國交付；進口商管理海關過境、關稅/增值稅及進口文件，相較海運市場會影響交期和到岸成本。（3）文件/語言——產品資訊及標識須符合烏方要求（含所需語言），進口商是確保合格文件及標識在口岸齊備的實際渠道。（4）若無持有有效合格文件的境內進口商/代表，受監管器具實務上無法清關或合法銷售。【注：具體的進口記錄人、關稅/增值稅及語言/標識要求，應在發貨前對照烏方海關及O'zStandart來源確認。】

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in practice — an in-country importer/representative (importer of record) holding the O'zStandart conformity document is required for customs clearance and lawful sale; landlocked rail/road transit and import duties/VAT apply
mandatory_status.cn: No equivalent requirement — Chinese export manufacturers have no statutory obligation to appoint an Uzbek in-country representative under Chinese law

source.publisher: O'zStandart — Uzbek Agency for Technical Regulation

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese refrigerator manufacturers in practice need an in-country Uzbek importer/representative who acts as importer of record, holds the O'zStandart certificate/declaration, and clears customs — there is no Chinese-law analogue. Landlocked rail/road transit, import duties/VAT, and Uzbek language/marking requirements apply. Confirm importer-of-record, duty/VAT, and labelling specifics against Uzbek customs and O'zStandart before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 实务上中国电冰箱制造商须有境内乌方进口商/代表担任进口记录人、持有O'zStandart证书/声明并办理清关——中国法律无对应规定。内陆铁路/公路过境、进口关税/增值税及乌方语言/标识要求均适用。请在发货前对照乌方海关及O'zStandart确认进口记录人、关税/增值税及标识细节。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 實務上中國電冰箱製造商須有境內烏方進口商/代表擔任進口記錄人、持有O'zStandart證書/聲明並辦理清關——中國法律無對應規定。內陸鐵路/公路過境、進口關稅/增值稅及烏方語言/標識要求均適用。請在發貨前對照烏方海關及O'zStandart確認進口記錄人、關稅/增值稅及標識細節。
